summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that EXR is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $141.26. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 29.4%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $150.67 and a significant trendline confluence around $148.41 (formed by 7 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
